# kCFStreamPropertyFTPFetchResourceInfo | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ CFNetwork ](/documentation/cfnetwork)

- [ kCFStreamPropertyFTPFetchResourceInfo ](/documentation/CFNetwork/kCFStreamPropertyFTPFetchResourceInfo)

-  kCFStreamPropertyFTPFetchResourceInfo 

Global Variable# kCFStreamPropertyFTPFetchResourceInfo

iOS 2.0–9.0DeprecatediPadOS 2.0–9.0DeprecatedMac Catalyst 13.1–13.1DeprecatedmacOS 10.3–10.11DeprecatedtvOS 9.0–9.0DeprecatedvisionOS 1.0–1.0Deprecated

```
let kCFStreamPropertyFTPFetchResourceInfo: CFString
```

Deprecated

Use NSURLSessionAPI for ftp requests

## [Discussion](/documentation/CFNetwork/kCFStreamPropertyFTPFetchResourceInfo#Discussion)

FTP Fetch Resource Information stream property key for set and copy operations. Set this property to `kCFBooleanTrue` to require that resource information, such as size, must be provided before download starts; set this property to `kCFBooleanFalse` to allow downloads to start without resource information. For this version, size is the only resource information.
